intro.title: Birthday of the most remarkable lady
intro.narrator_text: Dearest reader and by reader, I mean you, Maseera, it has come to my attention that today is your birthday. The ton is abuzz. The author is biased. You are, quite simply, the best thing that has happened to a gentleman name Ali. Now scroll down and see for yourself.

timeline.caption: The moment I realised I was in serious trouble.
The lake was nice. I barely noticed.
We missed the concert. It was the best night anyway. Don't tell the artist.
The legendary blue outfit. The internet is not ready.
Our first road trip. Lake was great, again I did not notice.
My birthday girl, looking like the gift herself.
Documented proof that she lets me near her.

envelopes.message: I could never get bored of you. You might think that sounds naive — how can you know that, in just six months? But love is a choice. A choice to wake up every day and choose you, through everything. And I choose you. Every single day, without hesitation.

I was somewhere far away, willing myself to do something sensible. I could not do it. I just could not stop thinking about you. The moments with you are so special that even a week apart feels like a year. Sometimes I want to be with you so much that it gets physically hard to breathe.
envelopes.from: The one who cannot stop thinking about you

envelopes.message: Your teethy grin when you bite your lower lip. The way your face lights up mid-conversation. How you bat your eyes at me sometimes in the most playful, ridiculous, completely devastating way. I notice everything, Maseera. I notice all of it.
envelopes.from: Someone who is absolutely gone for you

envelopes.message: We will grow in our lives and sometimes that might mean staying apart for longer. But I will never stop missing you, even when we are literally together. These are the memories that will keep me going. I hope we create a lot more.
I wish I was a better writer so I could express every thought of you properly. But alas, this is what you get for now. I do intend to get better, though. That is a promise.
Sometimes I worry I am too intense. And then I think I absolutely love this beautiful, cute, funny, amazing girl and I am going to show it. Happy Birthday, Maseera. I am so glad you exist.

portrait.name: Maseera
portrait.notice: It is with considerable bias, which this correspondent will not even attempt to conceal, that I bring to the attention of the ton a lady of quite singular distinction. Miss Maseera, whose laugh has been known to make the author forget what he was saying mid-sentence, possesses a warmth that fills every room before she has even properly entered it. She is funny in a way that catches you off guard, beautiful in a way that is frankly inconvenient, and kind in a way that she will never fully believe about herself. She chose, in September of last year, to give this writer a chance. He has not recovered. Nor does he wish to.

traits.label: Warmth
traits.description: Fills every room before you've entered it

traits.label: Wit
traits.description: Catches you off guard, every time

traits.label: Kindness
traits.description: Deeper than you will ever admit

traits.label: That Laugh
traits.description: Makes the author forget his sentences

traits.label: Grace
traits.description: In everything, even the small things

traits.label: Heart
traits.description: The most generous one I know

reminders.caption: The moon, whenever I look up
A good book on a quiet afternoon
